name: literature-review
description: Core paper pool and literature-review oriented report.
examples: scinet skill run literature-review --query "open world agent" --keyword "high:open world agent"

name: idea-grounding
description: Find similar works and supporting evidence for a research idea.
examples: scinet skill run idea-grounding --idea "LLM-based idea evaluation" --keyword "high:idea evaluation"

name: idea-evaluate
description: Collect KG evidence for novelty, feasibility, soundness, and differentiation.
examples: scinet skill run idea-evaluate --idea "Federated knowledge editing for LLMs" --keyword "high:knowledge editing"

name: idea-generate
description: Broader KG exploration for research idea seed discovery.
examples: scinet skill run idea-generate --query "automated scientific research" --keyword "high:idea evaluation"

name: trend-report
description: Trend analysis with citation-aware and timeline-oriented retrieval.
examples: scinet skill run trend --query "open world agent" --time-range 2018-2025

name: researcher-review
description: Researcher background review from author name or OpenAlex author ID.

name: quick-paper-search
description: Lightweight low-level vector title search for fast testing.
examples: scinet skill run quick --text "open world agent"
